allow: PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:9000/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@test.com","password":"test"}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode, Content)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/products?page=0&size=3" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/categories/tree" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)
